message:
chore(audit): record fresh-eyes audit batch 403 (cut.rs, fabric.rs, consumer.rs)

Audited 3 messaging module files (~11,423 lines total):
- src/messaging/cut.rs (3207L): SOUND — cut-certified mobility, incident rehearsal, CutLatticeIndex, BranchRegistry. 55 tests.
- src/messaging/fabric.rs (3633L): SOUND — SubjectCell, ControlCapsule, FabricState, thermal hysteresis, rebalance budget, repair bindings.
- src/messaging/consumer.rs (4583L): SOUND — FabricConsumer, cursor, pull requests, lease fencing, adaptive kernel. 1 LOW noted (revoked_tickets unbounded but bounded in practice).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
